description_long: This is a stylized adult female pedestrian with an athletic build, depicted wearing a sleeveless top, shorts, and tall lace-up boots. She has fingerless gloves on both hands and a utility belt with holsters or pouches attached at her hips. A small backpack is strapped to her back, and her hair is styled in a long, thick braid. The figure's stance is upright and alert, with arms slightly bent and hands open. The overall appearance suggests an adventurous or action-oriented character, suitable for urban or outdoor environments.
description: A stylized adult female pedestrian in athletic attire with a utility belt, gloves, boots, and a backpack, standing upright and alert.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sleeveless top, shorts, gloves, boots, and utility belt with holsters; facial features and front of the braid are visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the length and thickness of the braid, and the side of the backpack and holsters.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full backpack, the braid running down the back, and the holsters attached to the belt.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the profile, braid, and side details of the outfit and accessories.
attribute_clothing_type: athletic tank top, shorts, fingerless gloves, utility belt with holsters, tall lace-up boots
